ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the block */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the block in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hks_enterprises" (
  "enterprise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HKS enterprise */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block the enterprise belongs to */,
  "enterprise_name" TEXT /* Name of the HKS enterprise */,
  "services_available" INTEGER /* Whether services are available in the enterprise */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the HKS enterprise was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the enterprise */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Annual revenue of the enterprise */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Description of services offered by the enterprise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enterprise record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enterprise record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enterprise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hks_enterprises_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lsgs" (
  "lsg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LSG */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the LSG belongs to */,
  "lsg_name" TEXT /* Name of the LSG */,
  "hks_group_formed" INTEGER /* Whether an HKS group is formed or trained in the LSG */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the LSG was established */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the LSG */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LSG record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LSG record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lsgs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hks_consortiums" (
  "consortium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HKS consortium */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the consortium belongs to */,
  "consortium_name" TEXT /* Name of the HKS consortium */,
  "monthly_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the consortium */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the HKS consortium was established */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the consortium */,
  "yearly_income" INTEGER /* Yearly income of the consortium */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consortium record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consortium record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consortium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hks_consortiums_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registered_hks_green_mes" (
  "green_me_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HKS Green ME */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the Green ME belongs to */,
  "green_me_name" TEXT /* Name of the HKS Green ME */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the HKS Green ME was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the Green ME */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Annual revenue of the Green ME */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Description of services offered by the Green ME */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Green ME record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Green ME record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("green_me_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registered_hks_green_mes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_performance" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks in the district */,
  "hks_enterprises" INTEGER /* Number of HKS enterprises in the district */,
  "lsgs" INTEGER /* Number of LSGs in the district */,
  "hks_consortiums" INTEGER /* Number of HKS consortiums in the district */,
  "registered_hks_green_mes" INTEGER /* Number of registered HKS Green MEs in the district */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id", "year", "month")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, district officer) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user belongs to (for district-specific users) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
